productDisplayName: John Players Men Satin Stripes Blue Shirt
description: Style Note With muted and dark shades, this shirt will find its complement in a pair of light coloured trousers or jeans. Comfortable and breathy, this one will keep you light and airy throughout a vibrant evening. Product Details A dark blue shirt with dark green solid vertical stripes and greyish horizontal stripes made of rich cotton, has a medium spread collar, full buttoned placket with long sleeves and buttoned cuffs Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash cold using a mild detergent Tumble dry low Dry flat in shade inside out Use warm iron Do not bleach Size and Fit john players' trim fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size 40
